name: Alamosa Family Rec Center
description: Alamosa Family Rec Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Alamosa, CO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Boyd Park
description: Boyd Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Alamosa, CO. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
